snippet.description:
Available on PS5® today! 
 
God of War Sons of Sparta is a 2D action platformer with a canon story set in Kratos’ youth during his brutal training at the Spartan Agoge alongside his brother Deimos. 
 
They must overcome threats that will put all their training to the test while confronting the true meaning of duty and honor. 
 
Developed by Mega Cat Studios in partnership with Santa Monica Studio.

Zu einer atmosphärischen Produktion von Julez & M61 reisen sie zurück in die Blocks von Altendorf und Kranichstein– Orte, die einen nicht loslassen.

LYRICS:
Hook:
Zu zweit auf meinem Dach,
Sonnenuntergang,
Ich riech‘ an deinem Parfüm,
Ihre Augen grün,
Du warst mein Haus mit Boot,
Wir waren so verliebt,
Ich war nicht reif genug,
Das hast du nicht verdient.
⸻
Part 1:
Ich war blind, Suche Liebe bei ner anderen,
Baby wieso gehst du noch ran?
Ich vermisse dich, komm wieder in mein Arm,
Du bist die einzige, die da war, nur für mich und meinen Kram.

Geh nicht, bitte bleib da!
Zigarette, Wein Glas,
Hab dir geschrieben bebi, guck auf dein handy!
Ich schrei so laut, die ganze Welt kennt deinen Namen.
⸻
Bridge:
Seh‘ ein Foto, was rum liegt,
Es kommt mir vor, so wie gestern,
Da waren wir beide in paris,
Letztes Jahr an Silvester.
⸻

Ruf mich an, wenn bei dir später noch was geht,
Du freust dich immer, wenn ich schreibe, bebi sollen wir uns sehn?

Ohne dich vergeht die Zeit nicht..

snippet.title: Launch Gameplay Trailer | Marathon
snippet.description:
Mayday. Mayday. 
MAYDAY. 
MAYD ~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"?~~~~~~~ 

Marathon releases March 5, 2026. 

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save. 

Learn more: https://bung.ie/4654oFP

Pre-order Marathon now: 
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/ 
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ 
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b 

Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny. 

Follow Marathon: 
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame 
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame 
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net 
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame 
 
Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. Play with your crew, as a solo Runner, or form uneasy alliances with proximity chat. Scavenge, buildcraft, and take on greater challenges–culminating with the derelict Marathon ship hanging above. 

*Gameplay requires internet access and paid-for subscription on console (sold separately)

snippet.title: ‘Rose’: first trailer for Markus Schleinzer’s Berlin competition title starring Sandra Hüller
snippet.description:
Screen can unveil the first trailer for Markus Schleinzer’s Rose, starring Sandra Hüller, ahead of its world premiere in the Berlin Film Festival’s competition. 

The 17th-­century drama, set in the aftermath of the Thirty Years’ War, sees Hüller play an enigmatic soldier who returns to a secluded German village and claims to be the heir of a long-abandoned farmstead, all the while pretending to be a man.

Hüller’s character is inspired by numerous documented accounts of women disguised as men in European history.

Rose is the third feature by Austrian director and actor Schleinzer after 2011 Cannes Competition title Michael and 2018 Toronto premiere Angelo. The screenplay is by Schleinzer and Alexander Brom.

The Austria-­Germany co-pro is a Schubert, Row Pictures and Walker+Worm Film production. The producers are Johannes Schubert, Philipp Worm, Tobias Walker and Karsten Stöter.

The film is being sold by The Match Factory, and will be released in Austria on April 17 and in Germany on April 30.

Special thanks: Ali Varal

‘Başrol Sensin’ sözleriyle;

Ben bu anı yaşayıp gördüm
(Kalbim deliye döndü)
Artık artık tutamam içimde

Dünyam tersine dönse bile
Kıvılcım alev alır doğar küllerinden
Cesur adımlarım herkesin dilinde
Korku yok, yok çıkan sesimde

Dert değil düşmek
Deneme vazgeçirmeye
Titrese bile omuzlarım durmam

Kaybolduğum anda
Onlar hep yanımda
Aldım rüzgarı, ardıma bakmam asla

Bi hayalle geldik biz bu günlere
Artık korkmak kaçmak yok bundan böyle
Bizimle 
Gel sen de kır zincirleri düşünme
Fark edersin başrol sensin bu filmde
Vazgeçme

Herhangi bi akşamdı
Çıkasım vardı yokuşlardan
Kamera ve şöhrete aldırmam
Hedefim çok daha yolum var

Deniyorum 7/24 peşindeyim
Gecemi sabah eden gençliğime yemin ederim
Kanma güldüğüme buz kadar sert durabilirim
Kovalama benim gibisini göremedin hiç

Dert değil düşmek
Deneme vazgeçirmeye
Titrese bile omuzlarım durmam

Kaybolduğum anda
Onlar hep yanımda, aldım rüzgarı ardıma bakmam asla

Zor geldi belki başta
Savaştım şeytanlarla 
En çok da zamanla tam kaybetmişken
“Sizi Buldum” çıktık dipten
Omzuma yüklenmişken hayat
Üzmedi ilk defa

‘Başrol Sensin’ lyrics;

I've lived and seen this moment
(My heart went wild)
I can’t hold it in any longer, no 

Even if my world turns upside down
The spark catches fire, reborn from the ashes 
My brave steps are on everyone’s lips 
No fear, no trace of it in my voice

Falling is no big deal
Don’t try to talk me out of it
Even if my shoulders tremble, I won’t stop

The moment I'm lost
They’re right there beside me 
I've got the wind at my back, I'll never look back
 
Just on a dream, we made it here today
No more fear or running from here on out
Come with usbreak your chains, don't think twice
You’ll realize that you are the 
Main Character in this movie
Don’t give up 

It was just another evening
I felt like taking on the uphill climbs
I don’t care about cameras and fame
I've got goals and a long way to go

I’m trying, chasing it 24/7 
I swear on my youth that’s turning nights into day
Don’t fall for my smile I can stand hard as Ice
Don't bother chasing, you've never seen anyone like me

Falling is no big deal
Don’t try to talk me out of it
Even if my shoulders tremble, I won’t stop

The moment I'm lost
They’re right there beside me 
I've got the wind at my back, I'll never look back

Maybe it was tough at first 
I wrestled with demons 
and mostly with time, just as I was loosing it all
“I found you” and we rose from the depths
Even as life weighed on my shoulders #musicvideo 
This time it didn't bring me down

#başrolsensin #manifest #musicvideo
